topics.title: Federal income tax filing
topics.summary: Form 1040 due April 15. Extension (Form 4868) to October 15 but tax still due April 15.

topics.title: 2025 brackets & standard deduction
topics.summary: 7 brackets from 10% to 37%. Standard deduction: $15,000 single / $30,000 MFJ (2025). Inflation-adjusted annually (Rev. Proc. 2024-40).

topics.title: FICA (Social Security + Medicare)
topics.summary: 6.2% Social Security on wages up to $176,100 (2025) + 1.45% Medicare (no cap). Additional 0.9% Medicare surtax above $200k single / $250k MFJ.

topics.title: State income tax
topics.summary: States vary widely. No state tax: TX, FL, WA, NV, SD, WY, AK, TN, NH. California tops out ~13.3% for high earners.

topics.title: Estimated quarterly taxes
topics.summary: If you owe >$1,000 at year-end, pay estimated taxes quarterly (Apr 15, Jun 15, Sep 15, Jan 15) or face underpayment penalty.
